questionHtml: Outline the possible changes to this neuron that could happen during the subsequent development of the nervous system.
markschemeHtml:
a. the neuron forms synapses/multiple connections «with other neurons»
OR
a neural network forms
OR
more dendrites ✔

b. some synapses/connections in excess of what is required
OR
some synapses/connections not used ✔

c. it could be removed by neural pruning/apoptosis ✔

d. it could migrate to another place ✔

meta.title: Outline the possible changes to this neuron that could happen during the subsequent development of the nervous system.
breadcrumbLabels: Option A: Neurobiology and behaviour (Core topics)
